allow: PowerShell(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 ***REDACTED***y@***REDACTED_SERVER_IP*** "echo connected && whoami && docker --version && python3 --version")
PowerShell(ssh ***REDACTED***y@***REDACTED_SERVER_IP*** "cd ~/victron-dashboard && docker compose down 2>/dev/null; bash test_phase1.sh 2>&1")
PowerShell(ssh ***REDACTED***y@***REDACTED_SERVER_IP*** "cd ~/victron-dashboard && docker compose down mosquitto 2>/dev/null; docker compose up -d mosquitto 2>&1 | tail -5")

PowerShell(ssh ***REDACTED***y@***REDACTED_SERVER_IP*** "docker run --rm --network victron_default eclipse-mosquitto:2 mosquitto_sub -h mosquitto -p 1883 -u decoder -P '$env:DECODER_PASS' -t 'sys/test' -C 1 -W 3 2>&1")
